channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Fini les estimations floues ? Ce reconditionneur confie le prix de votre smartphone à une IA
item.description: Recommerce annonce un partenariat avec Microsoft Copilot afin d’améliorer le diagnostic des smartphones destinés à être reconditionnés. Grâce à l’intelligence artificielle, l’estimation de reprise deviendrait plus rapide, plus précise et entièrement guidée, selon le spécialiste du reconditionnement.

item.title: All PlayStation Portal owners should consider this one accessory — and it's discounted right now
item.description: The PlayStation Pulse Explore earbuds are brilliant for PS5 and PlayStation Portal, and at this discounted rate we're highlighting today, superb value for money.

item.title: Has the death of Windows 10 finally begun? Windows 11's popularity is suddenly skyrocketing
item.description: It's finally happening: Windows 11 appears to be shoving Windows 10 firmly aside.

item.title: Netflix CEO Ted Sarandos Opens Up on Losing Warner Bros. Deal
item.description: Now that Netflix has backed out of trying to get Warner Bros., Sarandos looks back on his failed deal and what's next.

item.title: Pokémon Pokopia is an expansive adventure disguised as a cozy life sim
item.description: Nintendo has a history of fleshing out the larger Pokémon world through spinoffs. What games from the Pokémon Snap and Detective Pikachu series lacked in terms of action, they made up for in the way they made pokémon feel like creatures with rich lives outside of their relationships with trainers. And as the mainline series […]

item.title: Pokémon Pokopia is my favorite Nintendo game in years, but its ‘narcissistic’ Pokémon are too polite for my liking
item.description: Pokémon Pokopia has broadly remained a mystery since its first announcement, with little given away about its gameplay mechanics and storyline; I’ve spent two weeks playing, and it’s a surprise worth waiting for.

item.title: GTA 6 pre-orders could drop in the coming weeks as marketing ramps up — 'we don't spend money on marketing until we're pretty close to release'
item.description: Grand Theft Auto 6 pre-orders could begin soon as marketing is set to ramp up.

item.title: 'This isn’t just another technology trend – it’s the catalyst for the most significant workforce transformation in a generation': More and more executives believe AI usage is 'critical' in their business
item.description: Report claims AI-induced job losses are a thing of the past – we're now in the era of job transformation instead.

item.title: At MWC, Tecno’s super-thin modular concept phone doesn't even have a wired charging port
item.description: On its own, at 4.9mm thin, Tecno's modular phone concept barely feels like a smartphone. It has a screen, a basic camera module, four low-profile pogo-pin connectors and that's about it. From there, you can seemingly build your conceptual phone however you want. At its booth at MWC 2026, Tecno had two families of modular components in two different colorways, which is surprising at this concept stage. The chunky telephoto lens and housing must weigh over three times as much as the base phone, adding up to 20x zoom capabilities, even if it was a little glitchy during my hands-on. The barrel als...

item.title: Cette batterie magnétique Xiaomi fine comme un iPhone Air chute sous les 60 €
item.description: La récente Xiaomi UltraThin Magnetic Power Bank est la batterie externe magnétique la plus fine du catalogue de la marque. Actuellement, vous la trouvez à 59,99 euros au lieu de 70,99 euros.

item.title: Vivo's X300 Ultra goes global and gets a huge 400mm Zeiss telephoto lens
item.description: Vivo barely has a presence outside of China but that seems to be changing with the company's next flagship phone. At Mobile World Conference 2026, the company unveiled the X300 Ultra smartphone that comes with a 200MP telephoto sensor, along with multiple accessories designed for pro photographers and content creators, including a SmallRig video cage and 400mm Zeiss telephoto extender lens. Vivo didn't go into detail about the phone's specs, but you can likely expect a high-end processor, screen, battery and other internal components when it's fully unveiled later on. Vivo did say that like th...

item.title: Éclipse totale de Lune : ferez-vous partie des rares chanceux à voir la « Lune de sang » du 3 mars ?
item.description: Quand notre Lune s’éclipse, c’est toujours un spectacle. Cette fois, de l’autre côté du globe, il risque de nous échapper. Mais pour ne pas bouder notre plaisir, une solution simple et gratuite existe.

item.title: If Nobody Got ‘Batman v Superman,’ Zack Snyder Still Does
item.description: Snyder can't escape the shadow of 'Batman v Superman,' but he can still talk plenty about it and its reception.

item.title: A Former Top Trump Official Is Going After Prediction Markets
item.description: As the battle over prediction markets rages on, Mick Mulvaney is leading a new coalition that calls these platforms illegal gambling.

item.title: How one CEO’s counter-cultural movement became Yondr
item.description: Graham Dugoni’s concerns about smartphone usage spawned Yondr, with partners including Dave Chappelle, Bruno Mars, and Madonna. Hello and welcome to Modern CEO! I’m Stephanie Mehta, CEO and chief content officer of Mansueto Ventures. Each week this newsletter explores inclusive approaches to leadership drawn from conversations with executives and entrepreneurs, and from the pages of Inc. and Fast Company. If you received this newsletter from a friend, you can sign up to get it yourself every Monday morning....

item.title: Google Photos permet enfin de créer des stickers personnalisés sur Android
item.description: Les équipes de Google mettent à jour la version Android de Google Photos en offrant la possibilité aux utilisateurs de créer des stickers à partir de leurs images.

item.title: Sony annonce enfin le PSSR 2 pour sublimer les jeux sur PS5 Pro
item.description: Sony a profité du lancement de Resident Evil Requiem pour dévoiler officiellement le PSSR 2, la nouvelle version de sa technologie d'upscaling boostée à l'IA. Cette mise à jour très attendue fera l'objet d'un plus large déploiement au cours du mois de mars.

item.title: Sony faces a $2.7 billion antitrust lawsuit in the UK
item.description: Another major antitrust lawsuit has launched in the UK. This time its against Sony, which could be on the hook for almost £2 billion ($2.7 billion) for overcharging PlayStation users. A class action case for about 12.2 million users argues that Sony "occupies a dominant position in relation to the digital distribution of PlayStation games and in-game content and that it has been unfairly charging its UK customers too much for digital games and in-game content purchased through the PlayStation Store." It argues that Sony "has a near monopoly" on add-on content and digital games through the Pla...

item.title: 49 euros pour un Tamagotchi IA sur votre PC ? Lenovo commercialise le Magic Bay Tiko
item.description: On pensait avoir tout vu avec les webcams et les projecteurs Magic Bay, mais Lenovo sort maintenant le Magic Bay Tiko. C’est un petit écran rond qui se greffe à votre PC pour devenir votre "compagnon" de travail. Un mélange entre un Tamagotchi et un assistant IA.

item.title: Best AirPods (2026): Which Apple Headphones Should You Buy?
item.description: From the AirPods Pro to the AirPods Max, these are the best headphones for your iPhone and beyond.

item.title: Vérification d’âge en ligne | Plus de 350 chercheurs internationaux demandent un « moratoire »
item.description: Plus de 350 chercheurs issus d’une trentaine de pays ont appelé à un moratoire sur les différents projets de vérification de l’âge des internautes, notamment pour accéder aux réseaux sociaux, dans une lettre ouverte publiée lundi et transmise à l’AFP.

item.title: On a vu la nouvelle voiture électrique de Xiaomi : 1 900 ch et un design hors-normes pour la Vision Gran Turismo
item.description: On a pu s'approcher de la nouvelle voiture électrique de Xiaomi, la Vision GT. Une voiture pensée pour Grand Turismo, mais dont la présence en Europe n'est pas anodine.

item.title: Oh great, here comes 6G
item.description: It brings me no pleasure to say this, but friends: The next G cometh. The standard formally known as 6G is still being established, but it's going to be a major topic of discussion at Mobile World Congress 2026, which gets started today in Barcelona. 5G arrived back in 2019, but also, did it, entirely? […]

item.title: Xiaomi 17 : ce nouveau fleuron perd déjà 350 € de son prix et s’impose comme un vrai rival à l’iPhone 17 Pro
item.description: Si les regards sont tournés vers le Xiaomi 17 Ultra, le meilleur rapport qualité-prix se trouve avec le Xiaomi 17. Un smartphone puissant avec une grosse batterieet une optique Leica pour la photo qui peut vous revenir à seulement 653 euros dans sa version 512 Go, au lieu de 1 003 euros de base.

item.title: The agentic future: Why AI's greatest power is amplifying human potential
item.description: Forget 'AI vs. jobs.' Augmented intelligence amplifies human potential, demanding trust, ethics, and collaboration.

item.title: Claude is topping the App Store charts thanks to 'cancel ChatGPT' trend — but the US military is finding it hard to quit
item.description: Claude is riding high on the Apple App Store charts, and is still being used in US military operations as well.

item.title: A God of War spinoff franchise could be on the way
item.description: A LinkedIn page suggests that Sony is working on a new franchise set in the God of War universe.

item.title: AWS UAE data center hit by military strikes, causing outages across the region
item.description: UAE data center struck by "objects" before fire department extinguishes fire and disconnected power.
